supplier.name: Jurong Fine Ingredients Pte Ltd
supplier.profile_semantic: Food-grade emulsifier and lipid-systems manufacturer on Jurong Island, Singapore. Produces E471/E414 beverage and bakery emulsifier blends to FSSC 22000, Halal and Kosher standards. Holds finished-goods buffer stock; offers expedited air dispatch from Changi within 48 hours.

supplier.name: Ingredientes Occidente S.A. de C.V.
supplier.profile_semantic: Food-ingredient producer in Guadalajara, Mexico, supplying emulsifier blends to North American snack manufacturers. Short lead times into the US but limited spare capacity; minimum-order flexibility is poor.

supplier.name: Provence Lipides SAS
supplier.profile_semantic: Lipid-chemistry specialist near Lyon, France, producing emulsifier systems for dairy and beverage applications. Strong EU regulatory record; production typically allocated a quarter ahead, so new-order lead times run long.
